privacy.title: गोपनीयता
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences और session data are stored only on this device. कोई नहींthing is sent को external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If ऑनलाइन AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent को configured services.

about.title: के बारे में
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype के लिए reference और training. कोई नहींt के लिए clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support और advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, या determine वेंटिलेटर सेटिंग्स.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against रोगी, your सुविधा workflow, और local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: आवश्यक before continuing को clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device और will be सिंक हो गया when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: समीक्षा safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data और uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible के लिए रोगी care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in सुविधा context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active सुविधा और भूमिका shown by your session. Keep records within correct सुविधा workflow और follow local escalation, समीक्षा, और approval procedures.

inputs.title: दर्ज करें:ing inputs
inputs.body: Use भर्ती करें को दर्ज करें: available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). वैकल्पिक ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing वैकल्पिक data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a सहेजें blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations दिखाएँ advisory वेंटिलेटर setting references के साथ a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align के साथ your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only और verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: निगरानी और alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a सिफारिश, use निगरानी को log vitals और labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds और should be assessed according को local protocol.

offline.title: ऑफ़लाइन behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (भर्ती करें, advisory summaries, निगरानी) works ऑफ़लाइन. Data is saved locally. वैकल्पिक AI features require connectivity. When वापस ऑनलाइन, जारी रखें as सामान्य.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume और oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory को expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: टाइडल वॉल्यूम (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, और pH, tied को a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance और verification state के लिए a reference range. Only active approved या verified ranges are eligible के लिए active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need समीक्षा before dataset या training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue के लिए समीक्षा decisions, corrections, exclusions, और audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current ऑफ़लाइन, ऑनलाइन, या syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden से सामान्य clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; दर्ज करें: SpO₂ और अन्य vitals when available. के लिए better matching, जोड़ें PaO₂, PaCO₂, और pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app ऑफ़लाइन
offline.body: भर्ती करें, advisory summaries, और निगरानी work ऑफ़लाइन. Data is stored locally. वैकल्पिक AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not आवश्यक के लिए core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, लंबित, retired, rejected, और unverified ranges are not eligible के लिए active decision-support display. समीक्षा source, version, scope, और verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness सहायता is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness और shadow-mode details are visible only को approved governance roles. कोई नहींrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs समीक्षा
needsReview.body: Use समीक्षा queue को check submitted data, request correction, स्वीकृत करें eligible records, या बाहर करें records के साथ an audit कारण.

guides.home: समीक्षा सुविधा context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, और records needing समीक्षा before opening a रोगी workflow.
guides.admit: Capture रोगी pathway और available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly और समीक्षा backend-confirmed calculations after सहेजें.
guides.tracking: Use ट्रैकिंग को scan recent ventilation status और समीक्षा needs. Read trend flags के साथ source data और local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture के लिए de-identified candidate records. Human समीक्षा is आवश्यक before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use समीक्षा queue को स्वीकृत करें, request correction, या बाहर करें records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards के लिए aggregate quality, समीक्षा, reference, और governance status. Avoid रोगी identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use सेटिंग्स के लिए खाता, सुविधा, accessibility, गोपनीयता, sync, और reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: समीक्षा FiO₂ और PEEP; consider recruitment; check के लिए shunt या V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: समीक्षा minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation और perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols और clinical judgment.

observations.title: Additional observations

timeSeries.name: नाम
